name: Lake Merced
summary_en: The archive record is dominated by water and environmental studies — a 1999 watershed sanitary survey, a 1998 baseline natural-resources inventory, a 1993 water-resource planning study with appendices, and feasibility work on raising the lake and on the Vista Grande diversion — alongside a 1973 waste-water master plan that sites a treatment plant at Lake Merced and a Recreation and Park capital plan listing a fishing pier and lake master plan. A 1965 annual report records concession and rental revenue at Lake Merced. The place is operated by the Recreation and Park Department, whose FY2025 budget line is about $250M. No contract in the data names it.
